title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
